response_parsed.opinion: As a creative, self-employed individual who's also a native American Muslim woman founder of my own startup in Los Angeles, I've navigated some tough conversations around COVID vaccines. My high conscientiousness really helps me stay organized when researching facts – it keeps the discussion grounded even with my creative side wanting to approach things artistically.
